request.prompt:
Verify exactly one K-pop event candidate using web search. Do not bundle another event.

Candidate ID: discovery-red-velvet-august-2-2026
Artist: Red Velvet
Claimed dates: August 2, 2026
Claimed venue: Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome (Hwajeong Gymnasium)
Claimed city/country: Seoul, South Korea
Raw candidate title: Red Velvet live event at Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome (Hwajeong Gymnasium) on August 2, 2026

Strict evidence rules (do not relax): exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence; accept only an official artist/company, promoter, venue, ticketing, or reliable media source; artist AND exact date(s) must match (timezone tolerance only ±1 day); venue/city must not conflict; a general tour announcement without this stop/date is not a match. Return UNCONFIRMED if no qualifying source is found and CONTRADICTED if reliable evidence conflicts.

Return only these compact fields, in this order. Cite factual claims with the web-search citation mechanism:
VERDICT: CONFIRMED | UNCONFIRMED | CONTRADICTED
ARTIST_MATCH: true | false
DATE_MATCH: true | false
VENUE_OR_CITY_MATCH: true | false
MATCHED_DATES: ...
SOURCE_QUALITY: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media | none
SOURCE_URLS: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

input.query: Red Velvet Korea University Hwajeong Dome August 2026

content.title: KSG Updates on X: "[INFO] 2026 RED VELVET FANCON A DAY IN RED & VELVET - Show Date: (1st) August 1, 2026 (Sat) 6:00PM(KST) (2nd) August 2, 2026 (Sun) 4:00PM(KST) - Venue: Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome - Ticket Price: General Seats KRW 143,000 (Including VAT) - Age Rating: 7 years old and https://t.co/Riab2hCboO" / X

Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome | TikTok

ﾏﾒ on X: "レッドベルベット ファンコン <A Day in Red & Velvet> 2026 8/1 6PM 8/2 4PM 📍Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome ⚠️キャパ8000⚠️ 伝説のラルジュと同じ会場😭 但し、このチケッティングスケジュールは🌍️勢には不利なのでは？😭 とりあえずファンコン確定でカムバ秒読みなの超嬉しい😭😭 https://t.co/XlblBAFmQK" / X

citations.cited_text: On June 15, the group revealed a poster announcing the schedule for “2026 Red Velvet FAN-CON ‘A Day in Red & Velvet.’” The fan-con will take place at ...
citations.title: Red Velvet Announces 2026 Fan-Con “A Day In Red & Velvet” Following August Comeback News | Soompi

content.text: Red Velvet's "2026 Red Velvet FAN-CON 'A Day in Red & Velvet'" is confirmed at Korea University's Hwajeong Tiger Dome on August 1 at 6 p.m. KST and August 2 at 4 p.m. KST,
corroborated by multiple reliable media outlets including Korea JoongAng Daily, Korea Times, and Soompi.
